name: Libra Table Lamp - 24 Inch Height - TBL4534 - Multi - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the LIBRA table lamp, where elegance meets functionality. Standing at 24 inches, this distinctive lamp blends bold black, striking blue, and refined brass, creating a captivating multi-color look. Crafted from durable iron and sleek glass, the LIBRA table lamp effortlessly enhances any rooms decor. Its metal construction provides a sturdy base, ensuring a reliable addition to your home. Perfect for a modern or classic setting, this lamp offers versatile styling possibilities. Let the LIBRA lamp transform your living space, providing a warm and inviting glow. Embrace the perfect balance of form and function as it elevates your home decor with its chic design and vibrant presence.
